top_signals.title: Rate cut red card
top_signals.summary: US labour market strength has kicked Fed rate cuts into touch
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Bitcoin cracks $60,000, sinking to lowest level since October 2024
top_signals.summary: The weeklong sell-off was exacerbated after a stronger-than-expected May jobs report Friday sent yields higher and pressured risk assets.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: TPG, Oaktree, Oak Hill Lead €1 Billion Debt for Evoke
top_signals.summary: Private lenders including TPG Credit, Oaktree Capital Management and Oak Hill Advisors are set to provide around €1 billion ($1.2 billion) of funding for the acquisition of gambling firm Evoke Plc by Bally’s Intralot.

top_signals.title: Securitize clears SEC registration statement hurdle, sets path to NYSE listing as SECZ
top_signals.summary: Securitize's SPAC merger is expected to close shortly after a CEPT shareholder vote, if approved, later this month.
